flags.message: Moran's I on mushaf order may be length-driven; follow-up: partial out log(n_verses).

Pre-registered 'median_resid>0' tripped on noise-level value (-0.019) while Wilcoxon p=2.7e-11 and intercept-at-median-n=0.89 show robust persistence. Document criterion as too strict; headline finding stands.
Mushaf is approximately length-sorted; Mantel r(NCD, |i-j|)=0.59 may be partly driven by length. Follow-up: re-run Mantel with length-residualised NCD.

RQA computed on stride-5 subsample (N_rqa=1248) of 6236-pt series. Rhythmic periods < 5 verses may be under-represented; overall verdict safely outside both 95% CIs but higher-resolution follow-up could refine DET/LAM.
